1.title: GLHF Pledge
1.description: Signed the GLHF pledge in support for inclusive gaming communities

1.title: Gone Bananas Badge
1.description: This gilded banana badge was scored by sharing a lulz-worthy clip during April Fool’s week 2025.

message.body: are these from like fsr or just like whatever
is the first game you booted up?
avoidance is gonna be funnily enough a lot easier than platforming
but also platforming is short here
you will see in the end of the game :)
but the basic premise is that this is Secret Santa game
there are some meme games, but mostly serious
you can go in the top warp
if you wanna see author's notes on the game
you can put a note for the future
so that i do not forget
Domu has an avoidance in the end
because this is gms game, not gm8
your mic does weird sounds, I think?
also game is louder than you
vidro is older, and author did not patch it automatically
Habluka likes to make confusing needle
also probably worth making mic louder
if it is on max, then you need to make game more silent
sounds as if you are touching mic
we do not even know all issues with win11
it was not ok for a sec, but now it is ok
the whole debuggerhelp is already a help for win10
win10 has issues with fangames, but win11 is whole another can of worms
fangames are requiring harder hardware than triple A games
you can make slighlty louder if you wanna
now i can hear you lol
in the beginning streamers ask their viewers
fratello che cazzo è sta merda ti prego gioca a qualcosa di vero twitch ti sta rovinando 🥶💀
eh però rispondi a quello che ho detto
questo e' un vero stream italiano
forse vuol dire che non sei così brainrottato quanto credo
ok, penso che puoi di nuovo diminuire il volume del gioco LUL
tempo 2 giorni e ho notato l’approprazione culturale degli account non italiani che producono brainrot italiano
forse i veri cucinati sono gli amici che abbiamo fatto lungo la strada
ma non me l’avevi già detto
vabbè se succede altro me lo racconti poi. il vero cucinato sono io che guardo le tue live con queste lucine rincoglionenti. ciao :)
he likes this kind of design
also this is one of his oldest works
i actually have never played touhou
although i have seen others playing
you are writing in the wrong row
you can also click on column A to mark game as cleared
you can mute debuggerhelp in volume mixer
you just gained skill in 1.5 hours Kappa
based on how i felt the difficulty back when i played these
top of the list is the easiest
however, yellow colour is next section of difficulty
it is quite difficult finding good beginner avoidances
so these are the best out there
but also i am not a fan of love utopia myself
but DF ratings are not good for that
just write command on the chat /vip [nickname]
vip actually don't turn off a ads, but I'm leaving in Russian and here's no ads beceause sanctions
oopsie, not leaving, i mean living
i know it is an error but 'leaving in Russian' sounds CoolCat
oh hey, talking about ads, my 1st VIP ad!
Sometimes I thought about couple similiar words and write it
do you love utopia yet? Kappa
A2 english level btw, I'm so good right
it sounded as if your chair screamed
there was some tool for such cases
it is a short adventure game with an avoidance at the end
author of the game like classic style
but i am thinking how to hint you
for one case you have to go left, for other to the right
the clue is not at the first second
look on the 2 fruits of the same colour going up
right before you die on the purple fruit
avoidance creators do like indicator patterns
i did not like the bouncing attack
you need to look into IWC for that info
C7 is banger but is pattern
Watch your words is more of mixed
i am actually not sure due to 2.0
i would say in 1.50 is probably 70-85
maaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaybe it is 60-70 but like i am not sure about that
i know people who played colonel 30-50 hours in 1.50
so like i do not believe it is lower than 70
i am glad you had fun :)
i bet me returning to fangames has more chances than zanis making a game
